caption: A woman with black hair and glasses, wearing a light green patterned top and a black necklace, speaks against a solid dark grey background. She is positioned in the center of the frame, gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the neckline of her garment. In the bottom left corner of the scene, a logo featuring a stylized golden circle and the text "NPTEL" is visible. As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to talk, her mouth moving and her hands shifting in mid-air to accompany her speech. Her facial expressions remain focused and professional throughout the clip, while the overall lighting and composition stay consistent.
